This [Bełchatów County](/wiki/Be%C5%82chat%C3%B3w_County "Bełchatów County") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Chajczyny&action=edit).

[[xai̯ˈt͡ʂɨnɨ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Polish "Help:IPA/Polish") is a [village](/wiki/Village "Village") in the administrative district of [Gmina Zelów](/wiki/Gmina_Zel%C3%B3w "Gmina Zelów"), within [Bełchatów County](/wiki/Be%C5%82chat%C3%B3w_County "Bełchatów County"), [Łódź Voivodeship](/wiki/%C5%81%C3%B3d%C5%BA_Voivodeship "Łódź Voivodeship"), in central Poland.[[1]](#cite_note-TERYT-1) It lies approximately 9 km (6 mi) west of [Zelów](/wiki/Zel%C3%B3w "Zelów"), 22 km (14 mi) north-west of [Bełchatów](/wiki/Be%C5%82chat%C3%B3w "Bełchatów"), and 44 km (27 mi) south-west of the regional capital [Łódź](/wiki/%C5%81%C3%B3d%C5%BA "Łódź").

["Główny Urząd Statystyczny"](https://eteryt.stat.gov.pl/eTeryt/rejestr_teryt/udostepnianie_danych/baza_teryt/uzytkownicy_indywidualni/wyszukiwanie/wyszukiwanie.aspx?contrast=default) [Central Statistical Office] (in Polish). To search: Select "Miejscowości (SIMC)" tab, select "fragment (min. 3 znaki)" (*minimum 3 characters*), enter town name in the field below, click "WYSZUKAJ" (*Search*).

**Chajczyny** [[xai̯ˈt͡ʂɨnɨ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Polish "Help:IPA/Polish") is a [village](/wiki/Village "Village") in the administrative district of [Gmina Zelów](/wiki/Gmina_Zel%C3%B3w "Gmina Zelów"), within [Bełchatów County](/wiki/Be%C5%82chat%C3%B3w_County "Bełchatów County"), [Łódź Voivodeship](/wiki/%C5%81%C3%B3d%C5%BA_Voivodeship "Łódź Voivodeship"), in central Poland.[[1]](#cite_note-TERYT-1) It lies approximately 9 km (6 mi) west of [Zelów](/wiki/Zel%C3%B3w "Zelów"), 22 km (14 mi) north-west of [Bełchatów](/wiki/Be%C5%82chat%C3%B3w "Bełchatów"), and 44 km (27 mi) south-west of the regional capital [Łódź](/wiki/%C5%81%C3%B3d%C5%BA "Łódź").
